headline: Unilever Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Unilever (NYSE:UL) reported a “good start” to 2026, delivering underlying sales growth of 3.8% in the first quarter, led by 2.9% volume growth and 0.9% pricing, according to CEO Fernando Fernandez. CFO Srini Phatak said the quarter extended a volume-led growth profile that Unilever has sustained acr
